Description: Required. Root element of the fields related to a period in the match.

attributes.Description: Required. The match period ID - one of the following: 1 | 2 | 3 | 4
Required. The start date and time of the period (UTC)
Required. The end date and time of the period (UTC)
Required. The number of total minutes in the period (includes stoppage time)
Required. The number of seconds in addition to the total minutes in the period (includes stoppage time)
